evals.description: Triggers on growth loop design request
evals.prompt: Help me design a viral growth loop for my project management SaaS
I want to build a referral program for my B2B SaaS. What reward structure should I use?

evals.description: Can explain AARRR pirate metrics with correct stages
evals.prompt: Explain the AARRR pirate metrics framework and how to use it to diagnose growth problems

evals.description: Can calculate and explain viral coefficient
evals.prompt: Our app sends an average of 4 invite emails per user and 20% of invited people sign up. What is our viral coefficient and what does it mean?

evals.description: Can prioritize activation funnel optimization steps
evals.prompt: My signup funnel has these drop-off rates: signup page 40% drop, email verification 25% drop, profile setup 60% drop, first action 35% drop. Where should I focus first?

evals.description: Can apply the ICE framework to score and prioritize experiments
evals.prompt: I have three growth experiments: (A) add social login, (B) redesign onboarding flow, (C) add in-app referral prompt. How do I prioritize them using the ICE framework?

evals.description: Can explain the difference between growth loops and funnels
evals.prompt: What is the difference between a growth funnel and a growth loop? Why does it matter?

evals.description: Can use cohort analysis to improve retention
evals.prompt: How do I use cohort analysis to figure out why some users retain and others churn?

evals.description: Can identify the aha moment and design onboarding toward it
evals.prompt: How do I find the aha moment in my product and use it to redesign onboarding?

evals.description: Correctly identifies retention as prerequisite to scaling acquisition
evals.prompt: Our Day-30 retention is 8%. Should we increase our paid acquisition budget to grow faster?

evals.description: Can describe a PLG implementation checklist for a freemium model
evals.prompt: We want to adopt a product-led growth motion with a freemium model. What do we need to implement?

evals.description: Warns against dark patterns and vanity metrics
evals.prompt: Our growth team wants to add a forced share screen after signup to boost our viral coefficient. Good idea?
